title: obione reichei
intro: Obione reichei, also known as the Sea Purslane, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, as well as minerals like potassium and magnesium, making it a valuable herbal remedy for promoting overall health and well-being. Sea Purslane can be prepared into teas, infusions, and extracts, or consumed raw in salads, and is also used topically in creams and ointments to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
